agentFallbackNotice: {{original}} no está disponible, usando {{fallback}} en su lugar.
noAgentAvailable: No hay ningún agente principal disponible. Inicia sesión en Google o instala Claude/Codex CLI. ¿Ir a configuración?
noAgentAvailableShort: No hay agente principal disponible. Haz clic para configurar.
agentTabAutoSwitch: El modelo no es compatible con Gemini, cambiado automáticamente a {{fallback}}
autoSwitchToAgent: Gemini no está configurado, cambiando automáticamente a {{agent}}
selectAssistantHint: Selecciona un asistente para comenzar una tarea

scanning.initialMessage: El agente actual no está disponible, detectando otros agentes disponibles...

items.prompt1: Help me query the main biological functions, chromosomal location, and common related diseases of the human gene [TP53].
items.prompt2: Search for the latest research progress and core literature on [single-cell spatial transcriptomics in tumor microenvironment applications] from the past 3 years.
items.prompt3: Query the clinical significance and corresponding targeted drugs of the [L858R] mutation in the EGFR gene in non-small cell lung cancer.
items.prompt4: I want to study [drought resistance mechanisms in Arabidopsis thaliana]. Recommend 3 authoritative public databases or online analysis platforms.

items.prompt5: Write a simple Python script to reverse complement all sequences in a multi-sequence FASTA file.
items.prompt6: Use R's ggplot2 package to write sample code for drawing a standard volcano plot.
items.prompt7: Write a Linux Shell script to batch decompress and rename all files with the .fq.gz suffix in a folder.

items.prompt8: Explain in plain language what [GSEA enrichment analysis] is, its core principles, and analytical purpose.
items.prompt9: Generate text examples of a standard GFF3 gene annotation file and a VCF variant file, and briefly explain the meaning of each column.
items.prompt10: What are the standard GATK pipeline steps from raw data to variant detection for [human whole exome sequencing (WES)] analysis?
